description: Checked-in sample dataset for local development and demos. Seeded through the real apps/api endpoints by scripts/seed_sample_data.py, not written directly to the database, so it exercises the same ingestion/chunking/embedding and risk-scan pipeline a real user would.

planted_scenarios.name: Duplicate payment - Meridian Logistics
planted_scenarios.description: INV-10456 and INV-10461 are the same shipment/amount re-invoiced 3 days apart - the exact pattern the vendor's master agreement and the invoice documents describe. The anomaly scan should flag this pair.

planted_scenarios.name: Duplicate payment - Acme Supplies
planted_scenarios.description: Two $5,000.00 payments for the same description, six weeks apart - a softer duplicate signal than the Meridian pair (no date proximity match).

planted_scenarios.name: Round-dollar clustering near approval threshold
planted_scenarios.description: Six transactions across six different vendors, all in the $9,750-$9,975 range, just under the $10,000 Tier 2 approval threshold documented in the Purchase Order Approval Matrix and flagged in Priya Nandakumar's email.
